sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (id INT, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_timestamps (id, event_time) VALUES (1, timestamp '2021-05-15 10:30:00');
SELECT sys.date_trunc('day', event_time) FROM test_timestamps WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_timestamps SET event_time = sys.date_trunc('hour', event_time) WHERE id = 1;
